author: Vinayak Gautham
summary: Wave 2 Evidence Integrity Engine — eight rules across four submodules: Module A Source Reconciliation (R-0007 AIS vs 26AS, R-0008 AIS vs Prefill, R-0009 26AS vs Prefill, R-0010 Duplicate Income Detection, R-0011 Duplicate TDS Detection), Module B Evidence Completeness (R-0012 Missing Evidence Detection), Module C Evidence Authenticity (R-0013), Module D Evidence Lineage (R-0014 Computation Provenance Graph). Added 17 tests (T-0011 through T-0027). Added JAB M-07 Evidence Integrity Score (≥95% target). Renumbered M-07/M-08/M-09 to M-08/M-09/M-10. Added docs/evidence-integrity.md.
authority: Income Tax Act — Section 285BB (AIS), Section 203AA (26AS), Section 199 (TDS credit), Section 139A (PAN)
notes: Wave 2 is now complete. The repository can now answer: (1) What is this income? (Wave 1), (2) Can I trust the evidence? (Wave 2). Wave 3 (computation rules) is the next milestone.
